lines.english: One who asks for a false gift,

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸ ਕਉ ਮਰਤੇ ਘੜੀ ਨ ਲਾਗੈ ॥
lines.translit: tis kau marate gharree na laagai |
lines.english: shall not take even an instant to die.
Maajh, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰੇਮ ਭਗਤਿ ਜਿਸ ਕੈ ਮਨਿ ਲਾਗੀ ॥
lines.translit: prem bhagat jis kai man laagee |
lines.english: One whose mind is dedicated to loving devotional worship

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਜੋ ਸਦ ਹੀ ਸੇਵੈ ਸੋ ਗੁਰ ਮਿਲਿ ਨਿਹਚਲੁ ਕਹਣਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: paarabraham jo sad hee sevai so gur mil nihachal kahanaa |1|
lines.english: But one who continually serves the Supreme Lord God and meets the Guru, is said to be immortal. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਹ ਪਕੜਿ ਤਿਸੁ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਮੇਲੈ ਜਿਸ ਕੈ ਮਸਤਕਿ ਲਹਣਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: baah pakarr tis suaamee melai jis kai masatak lahanaa |2|
lines.english: Taking him by the hand, the Lord and Master merges into Himself that person, upon whose forehead such destiny is written. ||2||
sings His Glorious Praises night and day, and remains forever awake and aware.
Without the Transcendent Lord, all are plundered.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤ ਜਨਾਂ ਕੀ ਧੂੜਿ ਨਿਤ ਬਾਂਛਹਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਚੇ ਕਾ ਗਹਣਾ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: sant janaan kee dhoorr nit baanchheh naam sache kaa gahanaa |3|
lines.english: I long for the dust of the feet of His humble servants. The Name of the True Lord is my decoration. ||3||
His Lotus Feet dwell in the minds of His devotees.
Standing up and sitting down, I sing the Name of the Lord, Har, Har.
Meditating in remembrance on Him, I obtain my Eternal Husband Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਕਉ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਹੋਇ ਦਇਆਲਾ ਤੇਰਾ ਕੀਤਾ ਸਹਣਾ ॥੪॥੪੩॥੫੦॥
lines.translit: naanak kau prabh hoe deaalaa teraa keetaa sahanaa |4|43|50|
lines.english: God has become merciful to Nanak. I cheerfully accept Your Will. ||4||43||50||
Raag Maajh, Ashtpadheeyaa: First Mehl, First House:
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੇ ਦੀਨ ਦਇਆਲ ਮੇਰੇ ਸਾਹਿਬਾ ਸਚੇ ਮਨੁ ਪਤੀਆਵਣਿਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: sache deen deaal mere saahibaa sache man pateeaavaniaa |1|
lines.english: O my True Lord and Master, Merciful to the meek, my mind is pleased and appeased by the Truth. ||1||
and all are called to the Mansion of His Presence, the True Court of the Lord.
By His Command, all are attuned to the Word of the Shabad,

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਵਾਰੀ ਜੀਉ ਵਾਰੀ ਸਬਦਿ ਸੁਹਾਵਣਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: hau vaaree jeeo vaaree sabad suhaavaniaa |
lines.english: I am a sacrifice, my soul is a sacrifice, to those who are adorned with the Word of the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਦਾ ਸੁਖਦਾਤਾ ਗੁਰਮਤੀ ਮੰਨਿ ਵਸਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: amrit naam sadaa sukhadaataa guramatee man vasaavaniaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The Ambrosial Naam, the Name of the Lord, is forever the Giver of Peace. Through the Guru's Teachings, it dwells in the mind. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾ ਕੋ ਮੇਰਾ ਹਉ ਕਿਸੁ ਕੇਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: naa ko meraa hau kis keraa |
lines.english: No one is mine, and I am no one else's.
The True Lord and Master of the three worlds is mine.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉਮੈ ਕਰਿ ਕਰਿ ਜਾਇ ਘਣੇਰੀ ਕਰਿ ਅਵਗਣ ਪਛੋਤਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: haumai kar kar jaae ghaneree kar avagan pachhotaavaniaa |2|
lines.english: Acting in egotism, so very many have died. After making mistakes, they later repent and regret. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭਨਾ ਕਾ ਦਰਿ ਲੇਖਾ ਸਚੈ ਛੂਟਸਿ ਨਾਮਿ ਸੁਹਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: sabhanaa kaa dar lekhaa sachai chhoottas naam suhaavaniaa |3|
lines.english: Everyone's account is kept in the True Court, and through the Beauty of the Naam, they are saved. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੁਕਮੁ ਪਛਾਣੈ ਸੁ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਵਖਾਣੈ ॥
lines.translit: hukam pachhaanai su har gun vakhaanai |
lines.english: Those who recognize the Hukam of the Lord's Command chant the Glorious Praises of the Lord.
Through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, they are glorified with the Naam.
Bound and gagged at Death's Door, they are brutally beaten.
The self-willed manmukhs are deluded; they find no place of rest.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਕੋ ਸੰਗਿ ਨ ਸਾਥੀ ਮੁਕਤੇ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਵਣਿਆ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: bin naavai ko sang na saathee mukate naam dhiaavaniaa |4|
lines.english: Without the Name, there are no companions or friends. Liberation comes only by meditating on the Naam. ||4||
Bound by duality, they come and go in reincarnation.
The false shaaktas, the faithless cynics, do not like the Truth.
In this world of her parents' house, the young bride did not know her Husband.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਿਖਿਆ ਲੇਖੁ ਨ ਮੇਟੈ ਕੋਈ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਕਰਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: likhiaa lekh na mettai koee guramukh mukat karaavaniaa |5|
lines.english: No one can erase pre-recorded destiny; the Gurmukhs are liberated. ||5||
Through falsehood, she has been separated from Him, and she cries out in misery.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਵਗਣਿ ਮੁਠੀ ਮਹਲੁ ਨ ਪਾਏ ਅਵਗਣ ਗੁਣਿ ਬਖਸਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: avagan mutthee mehal na paae avagan gun bakhasaavaniaa |6|
lines.english: Defrauded by demerits, she does not find the Mansion of the Lord's Presence. But through virtuous actions, her demerits are forgiven. ||6||
as Gurmukh, comes to understand the essence of reality; she contemplates her Lord.
She, who knows her Beloved in her parents' house,

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਵਣੁ ਜਾਣਾ ਠਾਕਿ ਰਹਾਏ ਸਚੈ ਨਾਮਿ ਸਮਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: aavan jaanaa tthaak rahaae sachai naam samaavaniaa |7|
lines.english: Her comings and goings cease, and she is absorbed in the True Name. ||7||
True is our Lord and Master; He loves the Truth.
The Gurmukhs understand and describe the Indescribable.
By His Mercy, we meet the True Guru.
Maajh, Third Mehl, First House:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਚੁ ਕਹੈ ਬੇਨੰਤੀ ਸਚੁ ਮਿਲੈ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੮॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak sach kahai benantee sach milai gun gaavaniaa |8|1|
lines.english: Nanak offers this true prayer: singing His Glorious Praises, I merge with the True One. ||8||1||
